creator: tijl@ulyssis.org
text:
On Saturday 12 December 2009 02:19:06 Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> * Tijl Coosemans (tijl@coosemans.org) wrote:
>> I recently switched email/hosting services. This patch updates
>> email addresses and URLs.
>> 
>> * In all ports I maintain change tijl@ulyssis.org into tijl@coosemans.org.
>> * Remove my name and email address from some pkg-descr files.
>> * devel/libtifiles/pkg-descr: fix layout (copied from devel/libtifiles2).
>> * lang/sdcc-devel, www/linux-flashplugin9, www/linux-f8-flashplugin10:
>>   update MASTER_SITES.
> 
> We require maintainers to use address specified in MAINTAINER. Could
> you please write from your old address?

Well, normally I would have done that, but they disabled the account
sooner than I expected - it was a student account and I'm no longer a
student. So I can send an email (like this one) with a fake From field,
but I can't receive any emails on that address anymore.

The only other thing I can think of is to check the whois of
coosemans.org and see that it belongs to me. Also, tijl@ulyssis.org
isn't subscribed to any FreeBSD mailing lists anymore (in case you
can check that somehow).
